MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING FURTHER RESPONSES
Off Calendar Nov-15-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.
Defendant's motion to compel further responses to request for admissions set #1, form and special interrogatories set #1 is granted. The Court has read and considered the non-substantive opposition to the motion. Plaintiff is ordered to serve responses within 15 days of notice of this order. Failing to comply with the previous agreement regarding providing responses and failing to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $1136.30 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
